name: Kangaroo Island Plantation Timbers Limited
summary: Kangaroo Island Plantation Timbers Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the forestry management activities in Australia. The company is also involved in the management of hardwood and softwood, and timber plantations, as well as milling operation activities. It owns approximately 25,000 hectares of Kangaroo Island land. The company was formerly known as RuralAus Investments Limited and changed its name to Kangaroo Island Plantation Timbers Limited in July 2013. Kangaroo Island Plantation Timbers Limited was incorporated in 2000 and is headquartered in Adelaide, Australia.
